title: Current-tyre finishability margins
summary: Add only current-tyre finishability and stop-debt pressure features to 001214.
rationale: Pit-next-lap is strongly tied to whether the current tyre can survive to the finish and whether the driver still owes a dry-compound stop. This patch encodes that state explicitly as local, target-free features.
implementation_hint: Start from 001214 exactly. Add a compact finishability block using formulas using the formulas below: estimate `total_laps_est = (LapNumber.clip(lower=1) / RaceProgress.clip(1e-3, 0.999)).clip(lower=LapNumber, upper=120)`, `remaining_laps_est = (total_laps_est - LapNumber).clip(lower=0)`, `base_life_template = Compound.map({SOFT:18, MEDIUM:26, HARD:34, INTERMEDIATE:24, WET:22}).fillna(24)`, `deg_penalty = 1 + 0.55*positive(deg_per_tyre_lap)`, `est_total_tyre_life = (base_life_template / deg_penalty).clip(8,45)`, `tyre_laps_left_est = (est_total_tyre_life - TyreLife).clip(-5,45)`, `finish_margin_current_tyre = tyre_laps_left_est - remaining_laps_est`, `can_finish_current_tyre = finish_margin_current_tyre >= 0 and remaining_laps_est > 0`. Also add conservative formulas from the same source: `conservative_compound_life = Compound.map({SOFT:17, MEDIUM:24, HARD:31, INTERMEDIATE:22, WET:20}).fillna(22)`, `current_tyre_age_to_finish = TyreLife + remaining_laps_est`, `current_tyre_finish_margin_signed = conservative_compound_life - current_tyre_age_to_finish`, `current_tyre_finish_pressure = (current_tyre_age_to_finish / conservative_compound_life.clip(lower=1) - 1).clip(-2,3)`, `current_tyre_cannot_finish = current_tyre_finish_margin_signed < 0 and remaining_laps_est > 0`. If 001214 already has some of these names, reuse them and only add missing columns. Do not add service-window urgency, rarity, legality online state, or model changes.
expected_effect: Help the model isolate late-race rows where a pit stop is driven by inability to finish on the current tyre.
risk: The heuristic tyre-life templates may be miscalibrated for some synthetic/generated rows and can overfit CV.
